course_descriptions.notes: 100% coverage. Deduplification strategy needed for multi-program courses.

sp_placement.notes: Shows which programs include a course, at what term, and CU value. Aggregation needed across programs.

phase_e_design.approach: title → Atlas course code matching via catalog lookup table
challenges: Title matching (guide title vs catalog code)
recommended_steps: Build title → code lookup from catalog data
Fuzzy-match guide course titles against catalog titles
Flag non-matches for review or exclusion

pre_phase_e_enrichment: None — all course-page enrichment from guides requires Phase E matching
